channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Big tech has defeated everything for 30 years, but for the first time faces something it can't control: a jury  Fortune
  2. Meta, Google Pivot in Addiction Trial to Accuser’s History  Bloomberg
  3. Social Media Jury Told Of Plaintiff's 'Embarrassing Sexual Act'  Law360
  4. Educators’ accounts highlight evidentiary clash in US social media litigation  MLex
  5. New Mexico Accuses Meta of Egregious Harm to Children in Court Case  Focus on the Family

item.title: Iran war cost will be passed to consumers, shipping giant boss tells BBC - BBC
item.description:
1. Iran war cost will be passed to consumers, shipping giant boss tells BBC  BBC
  2. Maersk introduces emergency surcharge as fuel prices soar  Reuters
  3. Implementation of Emergency Fuel Surcharge (EFS)  Hapag-Lloyd
  4. Maersk Has 10 Ships Trapped in Gulf, Running Short of Fuel in Asia  WSJ
  5. 'Working To Redistribute Fuel To Prevent Interruptions': Maersk Points Out Supply Unevenly Distributed Globally  News18

item.title: Trump’s divisive FDA vaccine regulator self-destructs, will exit agency (again) - Ars Technica
item.description:
1. Trump’s divisive FDA vaccine regulator self-destructs, will exit agency (again)  Ars Technica
  2. FDA vaccine head will step down in April after string of controversial decisions  CNBC
  3. Vinay Prasad, key Makary ally and a focus of controversy at the FDA, is leaving the agency  statnews.com
  4. Biotech Stocks Rally on Departure of Polarizing FDA Official  WSJ
  5. Prasad out at FDA after a number of public fights with drugmakers  CIDRAP
